message:
docs: populate extension catalog with 223 entries + conformance/perf data (bd-1chv)

Expanded catalog from 60 to 223 extensions with compatibility_notes
(conformance_status, failure_category) and perf_budgets (cold_load_ms)
for every entry. 187 pass, 36 fail. Sorted by id, schema pi.ext.catalog.v1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
